_comment: Art direction for Kithbound — the one place to re-skin the whole game. 'palette' is the shared set of colors the world AND the characters draw from; edit these to change the entire look. 'light.dir' is a single direction everything is lit from (up-left by default), which is what makes the scene feel cohesive — highlights land on that side, shadows fall opposite. 'characters'/'entities' choose procedural drawing or your own art: set render to 'sprite' and point 'sprite' at a res:// image to drop in art you made yourself (a missing file silently falls back to procedural). Colors are [r,g,b] or [r,g,b,a] in 0..1. Presentation-only: none of this touches game logic.
_daycycle_comment: A slow ambient drift from day to dusk and back, driving the warm wash (DayTint) and the vignette. enabled=false freezes it at the first stop (today's static look). period_sec is one full day->dusk->day round trip when loop=true. Set enabled=false to turn it off.
